body_txt: Usually the result of Never Found the Body . The family/friends/authorities decide that a missing person is indeed deceased, and life can go on. Often leads to a Mistaken Death Confirmation or Reports of My Death Were Greatly Exaggerated . Can also lead to Finally Found the Body . This can happen because the person: Note that in the fifth and sixth types of situations, it's likely that these people really are dead. When a person who is definitely biologically alive has their legal existence extinguished as a punishment, that's being an Outlaw . See also Undead Tax Exemption . Contrast Dead All Along .
